title: Progressive Security
description: Progressive security is a wallet design approach that starts with low-friction key management for smaller amounts and guides users toward stronger schemes as value, experience, or threat exposure grows. It treats hardware signing and multi-key setups as staged upgrades instead of one fixed wallet architecture from day one.

resources.title: Bitcoin Design: Upgradeable Wallet
resources.notes: Primary reference design for staged private-key-management upgrades as holdings and user sophistication grow.

resources.title: Bitcoin Design: Design Principles
resources.notes: High-level articulation of progressive security as a beginner-to-advanced product design principle.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for custody tradeoffs, signer models, and wallet scheme differences that progressive upgrades navigate.
